name: 86 Chaos 15.0.81 Python Ops Credential-Safe Fallback
label: 86 Chaos 15.0.81
notes: Fixes Python Ops and Python Order intelligence on Preview deployments where the browser Firebase project and available server service-account credential do not match. The routes now use verified-token payload-only fallback for client-loaded scan data instead of failing, expand recognized service-account aliases, and keep login/auth untouched.
